title: frangula dodonei subsp. baetica
intro: Frangula dodonei subsp. baetica is a subspecies of the Frangula dodonei plant, belonging to the Rhamnaceae family, commonly known as the buckthorn or alder buckthorn. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its laxative and antiseptic effects, which help stimulate bowel movements and protect against infections. The health benefits of Frangula dodonei subsp. baetica include treating constipation, digestive issues, and certain skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant properties to combat oxidative stress. Frangula dodonei subsp. baetica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
